languages.text: "Пусть меровцы используют мобильность, знание Заркова и природные условия. Они должны разделить противника и уничтожать его малыми группами".
"The Merovians should utilise their mobility, knowledge of Zarkov, and the environmental conditions. They must divide the enemy and destroy them in small groups."
languages.original_text: "Пусть меровцы используют мобильность, знание Заркова и природные условия. Они должны разделить противника и уничтожать его малыми группами".

traits.locale_text: "The Merovians should utilise their mobility, knowledge of Zarkov, and the environmental conditions. They must divide the enemy and destroy them in small groups."
"The Merovians should utilise their mobility, knowledge of Zarkov, and the environmental conditions. They must divide the enemy and destroy them in small groups."
"The Merovians should utilise their mobility, knowledge of Zarkov, and the environmental conditions. They must divide the enemy and destroy them in small groups."

languages.text: 「メロヴィアンは、機動力を活かし、ザルコフの知識と環境条件を理解して、敵を分断し、小隊ごとに破壊する」
languages.original_text: "The Merovians should utilise their mobility, knowledge of Zarkov, and the environmental conditions. They must divide the enemy and destroy them in small groups."

traits.locale_text: 「メロヴィアンは、機動力を活かし、ザルコフの知識と環境条件を理解して、敵を分断し、小隊ごとに破壊する」

languages.text: «Que los merovianos aprovechen su movilidad, su conocimiento de Zarkov y el entorno para dividir al enemigo en grupos pequeños y los vaya eliminando uno a uno».
languages.original_text: "The Merovians should utilise their mobility, knowledge of Zarkov, and the environmental conditions. They must divide the enemy and destroy them in small groups."

traits.locale_text: «Que los merovianos aprovechen su movilidad, su conocimiento de Zarkov y el entorno para dividir al enemigo en grupos pequeños y los vaya eliminando uno a uno».

languages.text: “梅罗夫人应充分利用其机动性、对扎尔科夫的了解、以及各种环境条件。他们必须切割敌军，将其分而歼之。”
languages.original_text: "The Merovians should utilise their mobility, knowledge of Zarkov, and the environmental conditions. They must divide the enemy and destroy them in small groups."

traits.locale_text: “梅罗夫人应充分利用其机动性、对扎尔科夫的了解、以及各种环境条件。他们必须切割敌军，将其分而歼之。”

languages.text: "Die Merovianer sollten ihre Beweglichkeit, ihre Kenntnisse von Zarkov und die Umgebungsbedingungen nutzen. Sie müssen den Feind isolieren und in kleinen Gruppen ausschalten."
languages.original_text: "The Merovians should utilise their mobility, knowledge of Zarkov, and the environmental conditions. They must divide the enemy and destroy them in small groups."

traits.locale_text: "Die Merovianer sollten ihre Beweglichkeit, ihre Kenntnisse von Zarkov und die Umgebungsbedingungen nutzen. Sie müssen den Feind isolieren und in kleinen Gruppen ausschalten."

languages.text: "Merovlular hareket kabiliyetlerini, Zarkov bilgilerini ve çevre koşullarını kullanmalı. Düşmanı bölmeli ve küçük gruplar hâlinde yok etmeliler."
languages.original_text: "The Merovians should utilise their mobility, knowledge of Zarkov, and the environmental conditions. They must divide the enemy and destroy them in small groups."

traits.locale_text: "Merovlular hareket kabiliyetlerini, Zarkov bilgilerini ve çevre koşullarını kullanmalı. Düşmanı bölmeli ve küçük gruplar hâlinde yok etmeliler."

languages.text: « Les Meroviens devraient tirer profit de leur mobilité, de leur connaissance de Zarkov et des conditions environnementales. Qu'ils divisent l'ennemi en petits groupes avant de le détruire. »
languages.original_text: "The Merovians should utilise their mobility, knowledge of Zarkov, and the environmental conditions. They must divide the enemy and destroy them in small groups."

traits.locale_text: « Les Meroviens devraient tirer profit de leur mobilité, de leur connaissance de Zarkov et des conditions environnementales. Qu'ils divisent l'ennemi en petits groupes avant de le détruire. »
